{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211422554AF2EED0B3E7D1CD9531\"}"},"total":1434},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585123317807235865","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本探案缉凶文，案件扑朔迷离，不是那种故弄玄虚的，这里没有谜语人，主角的每一步都是实打实的获取到线索，一点点剥开迷雾的面纱，比那种纯靠系统的无脑解答或者全是谜语人的故弄玄虚好看多了。\n这本书最出彩的是创作了陈忠这个黑夜判官作为主角的反面对照，天眼神探和黑夜判官一正一反，犹如天平的两端，就为了这个设定，这本书都值得五星好评。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766054078,"group_id":"7296402645810416703","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwE8fpTEZcRD70tLlXS5BJYzioRYyJJmT8knjnoH9Xin","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/51aec40f725c4bfeb951350ab8b73dc3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776617834\u0026x-signature=QzNrE%2BtnlBcsVjPKg2n1obhdPDQ%3D","user_id":"2791016713694976","user_name":"没有六个小时"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2791016713694976","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296402645810416703","book_info":{"abstract":"【天眼异能+刑侦破案+超爽推理+呆萌女主+高冷女配】重生2006年，成为一名基层刑警，本以为会和上一世一样默默无闻，却不料觉醒了一双‘天眼’，这双眼睛能看到一切肉眼看不到的蛛丝马迹，从而第一时间锁定犯罪嫌疑人，从此，刑侦界出现了一位破案天才……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce20214aa34dd025a53e9801a57e70b3","author":"提笔放牛","author_id":"","book_id":"7296402645810416703","book_name":"疯狂破案：一等功拿到手软","book_short_name":"天眼侦探","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"categ
